products.name: Blue Oyster Grow Log
products.description: Ready-to-fruit hardwood log colonised with blue oyster mycelium. Produces multiple harvests over 2-3 months.

products.name: Pink Oyster Grow Log
products.description: Vibrant pink oyster mushrooms from a ready-to-fruit hardwood log. A showstopper in any kitchen.

products.name: Shiitake Grow Log
products.description: Premium shiitake grow log with rich umami flavour. Fruits repeatedly when soaked and shocked.

products.name: Lion's Mane Grow Log
products.description: The gourmet's favourite - cascading white tendrils with a lobster-like flavour. Limited seasonal availability.

products.name: Oyster Mushroom Dowels
products.description: 100 oak dowels colonised with oyster mycelium. Plug into your own logs for years of harvests.

products.name: Shiitake Mushroom Dowels
products.description: Premium shiitake dowels for inoculating hardwood logs. Start your own shiitake garden.

products.name: Beginner's Grow Kit
products.description: Everything you need to start growing mushrooms at home. Includes substrate, spawn, humidity tent, and guide.

products.name: Advanced Cultivation Kit
products.description: For the serious grower - sterile grain spawn, bulk substrate, and monotub setup with detailed instructions.

products.name: Gift Grow Kit
products.description: Beautifully packaged grow kit - the perfect gift for curious gardeners and food lovers.

products.name: Lion's Mane Tincture
products.description: Double-extracted lion's mane tincture for focus and cognitive support. 60ml dropper bottle.

products.name: Reishi Tincture
products.description: Double-extracted reishi mushroom tincture for immune support and relaxation. 60ml dropper bottle.

products.name: Daily Mushroom Blend
products.description: A balanced blend of lion's mane, reishi, and chaga for everyday wellness. 60ml dropper bottle.
